# Upstream Jyutping Hybrid Fixtures

These fixtures are captured with upstream `rime/librime` `1.17.0` while using
the pinned TypeDuck-HK Jyutping schema YAML as source data. They are
composition and ranking fixtures only.

They are not TypeDuck fork ABI, candidate comment, plugin, or profile-surface
oracles. Those remain under `typeduck-v1.1.2`.
